scope: Tracked git diff and contour-named artifacts only; no file edits and no test execution by auditor.

checks.name: diff limited to visual CSS and static test
no runtime server adapter desktop scope
evidence: no runtime, server, adapter, or desktop files appeared in the tracked diff
boundary claims in closeout and matrix were consistent with the diff

checks.name: visual spec plausibility
evidence: semibold hierarchy present for headings, modal title, KPI numbers, and object titles

checks.name: artifact consistency
evidence: closeout visual claims matched matrix decisions
verification claims aligned between closeout and matrix
browser smoke details aligned with browser smoke artifact

checks.name: private reference trace absence
evidence: contour artifacts used only generic private-reference wording
no external reference-service identifiers, URLs, tokens, install prompts, downloaded screenshots, or private research notes were found by inspection

residual_risks: Auditor did not validate pixel closeness against the actual source render package.
Auditor did not re-run tests because the audit scope was inspection-only.
The worktree contains unrelated untracked dirty-tail files outside this contour; they must not be included in this commit.
